title: Integrate GMPO Triton kernel into geo_mean policy loss
summary: Wire the existing GMPO fused loss helper into compute_policy_loss_geo_mean with a config switch, parity coverage, and representative end-to-end timing.
success_gate: Preserve geo_mean semantics with a torch reference path and only default to the GMPO fused helper where the representative CUDA benchmark still wins.

results.note: compute_policy_loss_geo_mean now delegates to the existing GMPO helper with policy_loss.gmpo_impl controlling auto/torch/triton selection, preserving the torch reference path while using the faster fused CUDA path by default.

notes: Syntax checked with python -m py_compile verl/trainer/ppo/core_algos.py verl/workers/config/actor.py verl/workers/config/actor_check.py tests/test_gmpo_loss_kernel.py.
